---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ZacharieBuisson1
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zacharie-buisson/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:zacharie.buisson@orange.fr
---

I'm Zacharie Buisson, a data scientist interested in machine learning and
document AI. This blog is where I write up things I've been reading, building,
or fine-tuning — mostly around NLP, computer vision, and applied deep learning.

The posts here are informal working notes: model walkthroughs, small
experiments, and the occasional deep dive into a paper I found worth explaining
in my own words.
